scope: 8-frame bounded TorWIC Aisle_CW_Run_1 window, DROID-SLAM frontend/trajectory filler, global BA disabled because the smoke window is too short for proximity edges.
claim_boundary: This proves the raw-vs-masked backend and evo evaluation path is executable. It does not prove masked input improves full-trajectory SLAM, map quality, or navigation.

inputs.masked_policy: Only frame 000002 has the forklift semantic mask; other frames have empty masks.

interpretation: On this tiny smoke window, raw and masked trajectories are effectively tied. The result should be reported as pipeline closure, not as a performance improvement claim.
